title: Zoro and Sanji Enter the Match
description: Foxy challenges Luffy to a pirate game where crew members can be stolen, turning the island stop into a dangerous contest.
scene: Across pages 13, 14, 15, 16, this scene focuses on Luffy, Foxy, Nami, Usopp, Zoro. Foxy challenges Luffy to a pirate game where crew members can be stolen, turning the island stop into a dangerous contest.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: What kind of island is this...?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Hello there! Pardon us, coming through!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: W-What're you just barging in for!?

dialogue.speaker: Foxy
dialogue.text: She says her name is Sherry.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: You see that bamboo tree growing there?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Whoa... I can't even see the top!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: No look carefully. This bamboo tree..

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: As if I'd lose to a tree!

dialogue.speaker: Foxy
dialogue.text: Ha! Broke you like a twig!

summary: Foxy challenges Luffy to a pirate game where crew members can be stolen, turning the island stop into a dangerous contest.
